name: Maintenance Board
description: Kanban-style maintenance ticket board with drag-and-drop between columns: new, assigned, in-progress, pending-parts, completed, closed.

board.description: Full Kanban board with drag-and-drop columns for each maintenance ticket status

list.description: Flat sortable list view of maintenance tickets with status badges and priority indicators

mini.description: Compact dashboard widget showing column counts and most recent tickets at a glance

visual_brief: Kanban board with horizontal columns for each maintenance status: New, Assigned, In Progress, Pending Parts, Completed, Closed. Each column has a header with the status name and a ticket count badge. Ticket cards within columns show a title, priority badge (urgent/high/normal/low), property name, and assignee avatar. Cards are draggable between columns. A header bar above the board contains the title, a search input, and an 'Add Ticket' button. The list preset displays tickets as a flat filtered list. Mini preset shows a compact status summary with counts per column.

responsive.mobile: Columns displayed one at a time with horizontal swipe or a dropdown status selector. Cards take full width. Drag-and-drop replaced by status-change action buttons.
responsive.tablet: Three visible columns with horizontal scroll for the rest. Cards at comfortable size for touch.
responsive.desktop: All columns visible in horizontal scroll or fixed layout. Drag-and-drop fully functional. Cards show all metadata.
